---
id: reopen_issue
description: Reopen a closed issue that has new evidence
---

## Action: Reopen Issue

Persona: {{persona_name}} (`{{persona_id}}`)

Reopen the closed issue only when there is new evidence that invalidates its
closure.

**Reason:** state the new evidence that justifies reopening.

## Required output marker

```
ISSUE-REOPENED: REOPENED
```
